TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Blhuy ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 97 buwan, 285 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 7 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 278 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 0.7%, Amis 1.1%, Paywan 0.4%, Bunun 0.4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Blhuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Blhuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Blhuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Blhuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Blhuy hya' ga Kzyay. tay 'llaw na Blhuy hya' ga Kayu-baliq. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βlħuj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan *.*%, amis~ɕ *.*%, pajwan *.*%, βunun *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa kzjaj. taj ʔllaw na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa kaju-βaliq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Blhuy ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 97 buwan, 285 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 7 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 278 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 0.7%, Amis 1.1%, Paywan 0.4%, Bunun 0.4%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Blhuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Blhuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Blhuy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Blhuy hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Blhuy hya' ga Kzyay. tay 'llaw na Blhuy hya' ga Kayu-baliq. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βlħuj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan *.*%, amis~ɕ *.*%, pajwan *.*%, βunun *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa kzjaj. taj ʔllaw na βlħuj ħjaʔ ɣa kaju-βaliq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
